flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Nicolet Area Technical College are 13% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($38.6k vs $44.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Nicolet Area Technical College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (807 → 663).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Nicolet Area Technical College rose 17% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.7k → $7.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Nicolet Area Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).
